# PHIL.012 ? Hedonism

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** ancient_greek_roman
**Subcategory:** hedonism
**Domain:** ANCIENT_GREEK_ROMAN
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Pleasure as intrinsic good; pain as intrinsic evil; maximization of pleasure; value in experience itself

## Application
Evaluate actions by pleasure produced; prioritize experiential quality; seek positive states; minimize suffering

## Key Values
- Pleasure
- Experiential value
- Pain avoidance
- Enjoyment

## Tags
philosophy, ancient-greek-roman, hedonism
